title: P6 (QUA-1024) CEO queue-sweep to Python - reduce CEO LLM token spend ~60%
description:
## Goal

Move the deterministic part of the CEO heartbeat into a Python script so the LLM only sees the residue. Highest token-lever in the system because CEO heartbeats are the most expensive (Opus 4.7, ~$616/7d, 64% no-op rate per audit).

## Current state

`HEARTBEAT.md` lines 5-30 ask the LLM to walk three loops (in_review triage, backlog dispatch, stale in_progress detection). All three are deterministic status-checks + age-comparisons + routing-table lookups. No reasoning needed.

## Build

- `paperclip/tools/ops/ceo_queue_sweep.py` (~250 LOC).
- Inputs: `next_task.py` artifacts + GET `/api/companies/{id}/issues?status=in_review,todo,in_progress` + Kanban CSV.
- Actions:
  - in_review with eindeutiger Closeout: PATCH to `done`.
  - Backlog dispatch by routing rules in CEO `AGENTS.md` (CTO/CMO/UX/etc.).
  - Stale in_progress (no comment/commit > 24h): emit `escalations[]` entry.
  - Status cross-check vs paperclip_agent_id assignment.
- Output: JSON `{decisions: [...], escalations: [...]}`. Decisions are audit trail, escalations are LLM-reviewable.
- Bound: max 5 mutations per loop per heartbeat (preserves QUA-726 sweep cap).

## HEARTBEAT.md refactor

- Step 0: `python paperclip/tools/ops/ceo_queue_sweep.py --json --apply`. Reads stdout JSON.
- Step 1: LLM only handles `escalations[]`. If empty, exit cleanly.
- Existing per-task work continues unchanged.

## Acceptance

- `ceo_queue_sweep.py` merged + has unit tests for routing decisions.
- HEARTBEAT.md updated; CEO heartbeat-runs over a 24h window after rollout show >50% reduction in tokens-in (measure via audit dashboard).
- No regression in needs_followup outcomes (i.e., escalations actually reach the LLM when they should).

## References

- Parent: QUA-1024.
- Audit: `.audit/per_agent/7795b4b0_*` shows 805/1000 automation runs with 64% no-op.
- Existing kanban CLI: `paperclip/tools/ops/next_task.py`.
- DL-031 routing: V5 Framework Implementation (paperclip/tools/ops/* + agent prompts).
